title: Charred Sausage Skillet
description: A hearty skillet dish featuring charred sausages, onions, and bell peppers.
instructions: Slice the onions and bell peppers into large pieces.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onions and bell peppers to the skillet. Cook for 5 minutes, or until they start to soften.
Add the charred sausages to the skillet. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the sausages are browned.
Add 3 cloves of minced garlic to the skillet. Cook for 1 minute, or until fragrant.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven. Cook for 10-12 minutes, or until the sausages are cooked through.
Remove the skillet from the oven. Let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
